member.name: T:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to register the API Test Spark in a .NET Minimal API application.

member.name: M:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkExtensions.MapApiTestSpark(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Action{ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions})
member.summary: Registers the API Test Spark SPA at /api-test-spark/.

list.item: Call app.UseForwardedHeaders() BEFORE this method when running behind a reverse proxy so baseUrl in the config response reflects the public URL.
The harness is always served at /api-test-spark/. Custom mount paths are not supported in this release.

member.name: T:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile
member.summary: Configuration for one remote API shown by the API Test Spark remote explorer.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.Id
member.summary: Stable identifier used in browser routes and server proxy requests. New profiles receive a GUID by default.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.Name
member.summary: Human-friendly name displayed in remote API navigation and documentation screens.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.Description
member.summary: Optional short description displayed with this remote API.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.RemoteBaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL used for endpoint calls for this remote API.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.RemoteOpenApiUrl
member.summary: URL of the OpenAPI v3 JSON document for this remote API.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.RemoteOpenApiApiKeyHeader
member.summary: Header name used to send an API key when fetching the remote OpenAPI document.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.RemoteOpenApiApiKeyValue
member.summary: API key value held on the server for proxy fetches. Never returned by config.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.RemoteOpenApiBearerToken
member.summary: Bearer token held on the server for proxy fetches. Never returned by config.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.RemoteApiProfile.RemoteDefaultHeaders
member.summary: Headers injected into endpoint calls for this remote API.

member.name: T:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions
member.summary: Configuration for the API Test Spark middleware. Pass an action to to customise.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.OpenApiUrl
member.summary: Relative or absolute URL to the host app's OpenAPI v3 JSON document. Default: "/openapi.json". Set to null to disable endpoint autodiscovery.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.AuthScheme
member.summary: Auth scheme advertised to the SPA (e.g. "Bearer", "ApiKey", "Basic"). This is metadata only — never a token value.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.DefaultHeaders
member.summary: Default headers injected into every SPA request to host app endpoints. MUST NOT contain actual credentials or tokens — values are served publicly via the config endpoint.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.Environments
member.summary: Environments in which the harness is active. Empty array = all environments. Example: new[] { "Development", "Staging" }

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.EnableVerboseLogging
member.summary: When true, emits ILogger.LogDebug for every static asset request and SPA fallback. Default: false. To enable diagnostics without redeploying, set Logging:LogLevel:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestHarness=Debug in appsettings at runtime.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.CorsOrigins
member.summary: Additional origins allowed to call the config endpoint beyond same-origin. Default: empty (same-origin only). Use for local development when the SPA dev server and .NET API run on different ports, e.g. new[] { "http://localhost:5151" }.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.EnableDemoIntegrations
member.summary: When true, the SPA shows the built-in demo integrations (JokeAPI and JSONPlaceholder) in the home screen and registers their routes. Set to false to hide these demos and present only your host API and the API Doc Builder. Default: true.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.RemoteApiProfiles
member.summary: Remote APIs shown in the remote explorer and documentation builder. Values configured here are served as metadata only; credential values are redacted from /api-test-spark/config and used only by the server-side spec proxy.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.RemoteDefaultHeaders
member.summary: Headers injected into every SPA request when calling a remote API (i.e. when is set). These headers are separate from and only apply to remote calls — they do not affect requests to the local host app. Values are served via /api-test-spark/config; the harness MUST NOT be exposed to the public internet.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.RemoteBaseUrl
member.summary: Optional base URL used for all API calls when testing a remote API. When set, the SPA uses this URL as the base for every endpoint request instead of the host app's own origin. Must begin with http:// or https://. Default: null (use the host app's own origin).

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.RemoteOpenApiUrl
member.summary: Optional URL of a remote OpenAPI v3 JSON document. When set, the SPA fetches this document via the server-side proxy at /api-test-spark/remote-spec instead of discovering endpoints locally. Must begin with http:// or https://. Default: null (use local endpoint discovery).

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.RemoteOpenApiApiKeyHeader
member.summary: Header name used to send an API key when fetching the remote OpenAPI document (e.g. "X-Api-Key"). Requires to also be set. Default: null.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.RemoteOpenApiApiKeyValue
member.summary: API key value sent in the header when fetching the remote OpenAPI document. This value is returned in the /api-test-spark/config response — the harness endpoint is trusted for local/development use only and MUST NOT be exposed to the public internet. Default: null.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.RemoteOpenApiBearerToken
member.summary: Bearer token sent as Authorization: Bearer {token} when fetching the remote OpenAPI document. This value is returned in the /api-test-spark/config response — the harness endpoint is trusted for local/development use only and MUST NOT be exposed to the public internet. Default: null.

member.name: P:ApiTestSpark.ApiTestSparkOptions.TestHttpClient
member.summary: Optional override for the remote spec proxy. Intended for integration testing only — allows injecting a test HttpClient without replacing the shared static instance. Leave null in production; the harness uses its own shared client by default.
